markdown:
#  Activate Budget Codes on a Project 
##  Background 
If your team has created budget codes on a project, Procore automatically activates the codes. However, if you deactivate a budget code, you may want to re-activate it at a later time.
##### Example
As shown in the illustrations below, an 'Active' budget code is available in the drop-down list as a selection in the 'Budget Code' column in all of Procore's Project Financials tools. An 'Inactive' budget code is not available for use.
##### Active Budget Codes
Appear as options in the 'Budget Code' drop-down list.
![Active Budget Code In Drop Down](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/863261eea089fe1c6fc13deb27117898/6d1e0fbeffa8ed33af2f66960b998ffe/active-budget-code-in-drop-down.png?fm=webp)
##### Inactive Budget Codes
Do NOT Appear as options in the 'Budget Code' drop-down list.
![Inactive Code Not In Drop Down](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2e46a7038f9eb1a50cc6ae5e642705c7/e399e68f41fc8cfb3cec9521b8cb7ec2/inactive-code-not-in-drop-down.png?fm=webp)
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the Project level Admin tool.   
OR
    * 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on the Project level Admin tool with the ['Manage WBS Codes' granular permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) enabled on your permission template.


##  Steps 
  * Activate a Budget Code
  * Activate Budget Codes in Bulk


### Activate a Budget Code
  1. Navigate to the project's **Admin** tool.
  2. Click the **Work Breakdown Structure** link.
  3. Click the **Budget Code Usage** tab.
  4. Locate the budget code that you want to deactivate. 
#####  Notes
To help you locate the code, you have these options:
     * To search for a specific budget code, type in the desired code in the **Search** box.
  5. Click the **Status** drop-down list and select the _Active_ option.   
![Activate Project Budget Code](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0ccda8f56053ad7ce5a938cf3de6af07/3dd9fb8e983d69652735949a7bdc3b52/activate-project-budget-code.png?fm=webp)  
Procore activates the budget code on the project. The code now appears as option to select from the drop-down list in the 'Budget Code' column' on all of the tools in Project Financials.


### Activate Budget Codes in Bulk
  1. Navigate to the project's **Admin** tool.
  2. Click the **Work Breakdown Structure** link.
  3. Click the **Budget Code Usage** tab.
  4. Mark the checkboxes that correspond to one or more budget codes that you want to activate.
  5. Click the **Change Status** menu and choose **Active** from the drop-down list.   
![Activate Budget Codes In Bulk](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e00b5a4ca84a015256b8b4dc48046b99/455b6d319ad4b0e0ca01fa40bddb7f73/activate-budget-codes-in-bulk.png?fm=webp)

  * [What is a budget code in Procore's WBS?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-budget-code-in-procores-wbs)
title: Activate Budget Codes on a Project
description: How to activate one or more budget codes on a Procore project.
